title: REBD-491 Risa Shiro Risa's pale and sweet youth, Lisa Shiraki
description: The lead role of this work is Risa Shiro and Lisa Shiraki! !! A beautiful girl with a charming smile and a lovely idol visual! !! Lisa, a delicate infant with beautiful small breasts, feels like she's doing something wrong when she's naked! !! She has a girlish hobby of collecting and reading shojo manga, and a slightly unusual hobby of collecting and making food samples. A bright, energetic, lively and innocent beautiful girl challenges her first image work! !! The scene where you can enjoy a pseudo date was shot with the feeling of a real date, so I want everyone to see it with the same feeling. I would like you to experience the cute Lisa and your own light and sweet youth! !! [* This work is an image video]
